## **Bugs and stability** {#theme-bugs_stability}

   **Bugs and stability.**
      8 recent review(s) mention bugs and stability.
      Review window: Jan 27, 2026 - Jul 15, 2026
      **Why it matters:** Users report reliability problems. This points to quality gaps competitors can exploit.

         **Review examples:**
            1. _Noratuuuuuuni_, Jul 6, 2026, 1/5: "So many bugs I'm fed up!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!! The paid version that I paid for doesn't want to work, I'm breaking!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!"
            2. _plausy123_, Jul 2, 2026, 1/5: "A buggy mess that gets worse with every updates. AI features are useless and the app gets more power hungry. Switched back to GN5 while trying out alternatives."
            3. _tibo2jas_, Jul 1, 2026, 1/5: "Impossible to purchase the premium mode so with 3 notebook i’m unable to use it. The payement methods are broken"
